tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Revision of Days 1-9.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision of Days 1-9 का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I eat rice. Does she speak English? My name is Rohan, and I am from Delhi. I have been working here for two years. Close the door.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) about your day using Revision of Days 1-9.
tasks.hindiPrompt: अपने दिन के बारे में Revision of Days 1-9 का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Don't be late. Let's go to the market. I am happy. They were tired yesterday. This is my book.

tasks.prompt: Translate the following into English: "वे मेरे दोस्त हैं।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "I has been working here for two years."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I have been working here for two years.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue between two people using Revision of Days 1-9.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Revision of Days 1-9 का उपयोग करते हुए दो व्यक्तियों के बीच 4 पंक्तियों का संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She has finished her work. I had a car. He had already left when I arrived. By tomorrow, I will have finished the report.
